infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SayCart uses speech recognition so you can add groceries and prices by voice.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SayCart uses the microphone to capture your voice for item and price entry.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: SayCart uses Face ID to unlock your vault.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SayCart uses the camera to scan grocery share QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SayCart uses your photo library to import a grocery share QR from an image.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SayCart to use the microphone for voice entry.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow SayCart to use speech recognition for voice entry.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SayCart to use the camera to scan a grocery share QR code.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SayCart to access photos to import a grocery share QR from an image.
